tweets.text:
Anthropic just introduced "Dreaming" for Claude Managed Agents—a game-changer for AI memory. 

Instead of just forgetting old context, agents now perform scheduled "dreaming" to curate patterns and optimize long-term knowledge. The future of agentic orchestration is here. 🧠

#AI https://t.co/o1iMwgKkNv

tweets.text: @newlinedotco Persistent memory layer + enough real-world context is key for agents – totally on point. The thread "From AI Memory Silos to Multi-Agent Memory"   explores this further.What do you think?    https://t.co/nDaYsxvZMD
